title: Ivyline Planter in Sienna Ceramic with Chevron Print - Tall Design and Slim Silhouette - Waterproof Indoor Round Flower Pot - H15 x D15 cm
features: Premium ceramic planter with a contemporary chevron print in Sienna.
Made in Portugal with precision and craftsmanship.
Ideal for showcasing your Areca Palm or Swiss Cheese plant.
Round shape, tall design, and slim silhouette for perfect plant accommodation.
description: From the manufacturer Chevron Sienna Planter Introducing the Festive Chevron Planter in Sienna - a premium ceramic creation made in Portugal that embodies modern trends with its captivating chevron print. This waterproof indoor planter is more than just a home for your plants; it's a work of art that enhances your interior decor. Crafted with precision and European craftsmanship, this planter's round shape, tall design, and slim silhouette are thoughtfully designed to provide the perfect space for your Areca Palm or Swiss Cheese plant. Let your green companions thrive in style.
